title: Positive flow: Enter valid route number and submit
test_steps: Open the Transit Tracker app. | Navigate to the form screen. | Enter '12345' into the 'route number' input field. | Tap the 'SUBMIT' button.
expected_result: The app should display a confirmation message indicating the route number has been submitted successfully.

title: Negative flow: Empty route number submission
test_steps: Open the Transit Tracker app. | Navigate to the form screen. | Tap the 'SUBMIT' button without entering a route number.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that a route number is required.

title: Negative flow: Invalid route number submission
test_steps: Open the Transit Tracker app. | Navigate to the form screen. | Enter 'abcde' into the 'route number' input field. | Tap the 'SUBMIT' button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that the route number is invalid.

title: Negative flow: Negative route number submission
test_steps: Open the Transit Tracker app. | Navigate to the form screen. | Enter '-12345' into the 'route number' input field. | Tap the 'SUBMIT' button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that the route number is invalid.

title: Negative flow: Too long route number submission
test_steps: Open the Transit Tracker app. | Navigate to the form screen. | Enter '12345678901234567890' into the 'route number' input field. | Tap the 'SUBMIT' button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that the route number is too long.

title: Negative flow: Too short route number submission
test_steps: Open the Transit Tracker app. | Navigate to the form screen. | Enter '1234' into the 'route number' input field. | Tap the 'SUBMIT' button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that the route number is too short.

title: Negative flow: Special characters route number submission
test_steps: Open the Transit Tracker app. | Navigate to the form screen. | Enter '!@#$%^&*()' into the 'route number' input field. | Tap the 'SUBMIT' button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that the route number contains special characters.

title: Negative flow: Empty form navigation
test_steps: Open the Transit Tracker app. | Navigate to the form screen. | Tap the 'SUBMIT' button without entering a route number.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating that a route number is required.
